name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: A whole column attacking us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The pushback we're seeing? It's a sign that we're winning.
| | "Left-wing activists are already showing their anti-market tendencies, piling pressure on President-elect Joe Biden to use obscure agencies to impose strident regulations"
– Chris Tomlinson, _Houston Chronicle_ , 12/4/20
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M)
Friend,
The _Houston Chronicle_ published a whole column attacking Evergreen Action.
Why? For urging the Treasury Department to address climate risk in the financial system and curb the gross influence of fossil fuel corporations. _Yes, really._
We're making the case for bold climate action -- and that means breaking the grip Big Polluters have on too much of our government. _The pushback we're seeing now is a sign that we're winning._
**[Will you contribute today to keep us strong? Polluters (and those using their talking points) are going to use every tool at their disposal to try to set us back, and every dollar helps us make the case for why and how we need to take on the biggest challenge of our time.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1275?t=3&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$1 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1276?t=4&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1277?t=5&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1278?t=6&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1279?t=7&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1280?t=8&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1275?t=9&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M)
---
The timing of the _Chronicle's_ column is telling: It came out just a day after we launched our Five to Mobilize campaign, which lays out five steps the Treasury Department and 20 other federal agencies can take to address climate change.
The actions we're fighting for are not strident; they're stringent, and they're necessary for meeting the challenge of climate change at the scale and speed that science demands.
Climate is not one issue -- it's every issue. And every federal agency must be a part of the response. **We have a plan to make that happen -- and now, those who want to preserve the status quo are getting nervous.**
**[Contribute to Evergreen today to help us keep up the momentum -- and fend off the attacks that are sure to come -- as we make bold climate action a top priority for the Biden administration.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1275?t=10&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M)**
Thank you,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action
[CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1275?t=11&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=5006%2E53494%2ELHzk9M). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

subject: Perdue on Newsmax: I've Been Fighting for Donald Trump Since He Got Elected
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/df53ea880732/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66683?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| _**Perdue on Newsmax: I've Been Fighting for Donald Trump Since He Got Elected**_
---
| Folks -

Tonight, Senator David Perdue joined Sean Spicer on Newsmax to discuss what’s at stake in Georgia.

**SPICER:** _“I'm a team player. If we don't win, your point is exactly right - AOC and Chuck Schumer get the steering wheel and they start driving, and everything that President Trump has done over four years gets undone one piece by one piece...

“I remember being at Trump Tower during the campaign in 2016. It was David Perdue that was out there saying, ‘What else can I do to help?’ when it wasn't popular. I just think people in Georgia, you need to know that... David Perdue has been there since the beginning and we need to keep him there to continue to fight.”_

**PERDUE:******_“The majority of the Senate is very critical. It's all on the line here in Georgia... What Schumer is saying in his own words... ‘take Georgia, change America.’ AOC echoed the same thing a couple days later and said, you know, 'We need those two seats in Georgia because we don't want to negotiate. We will get the Green New Deal without compromise.' When people hear that, they show up and they realize what's at stake here. We're out there right now making sure that they understand how important it is that we get these votes back out in January.” _

**Click[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c85245fb80&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the segment.**
_Click[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=94d47a2c81&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=88598fd5ea&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c7cb2940da6b/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66643?e=02cd889ad3)

| Folks,
This Thursday, Vice President Pence will be back in Georgia for another **Defend the Majority Rally** to highlight what's at stake in these elections and the importance of getting out the vote!
_The future of our country is at stake_. It's crucial that we stand with Senators Perdue and Loeffler as they fight to defend our majority in the Senate. We hope you’ll join us to hear honored speaker **Vice President Pence** share about the historic accomplishments of the Trump Administration and the Republican Senate Majority. **_Thursday, December 10, 2020_** _**Defend the Majority Rally with Vice President Mike Pence**_ **DOORS OPEN: 12:30 PM** **EVENT STARTS: 2:00 PM** 1501 Aviation Way Augusta, GA 30906
---

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Jon Ossoff Would Serve The Communist Chinese Regime, Not Georgia
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Communist Chinese regime
body:
Peter,The Georgia Senate runoffs are underway, and the stakes could not be any higher. The soul of America is on the line in Georgia. Chuck Schumer has said that he wants to TAKE Georgia and CHANGE America.

While we continue to stand with President Trump to secure the integrity of our election system, we must also stand with him to hold the line and defend the Republican Senate Majority.

Because right now, two of the most radical Democrats are running for Congress - Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff. Raphael is a radical's radical. He's anti-police, anti-Israel, anti-military and pro-Marxism.

Even worse, Jon Ossoff is bought and paid for by the Communist Chinese regime. [Check out my latest editorial in _Townhall_ outlining his ties to Communist China.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xhktjht-fuutjhhtj-r/)[**Jon Ossoff Would Serve The Communist Chinese Regime, Not Georgia**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xhktjht-fuutjhhtj-y/) But Georgians can support two strong conservatives who will never back down to Communist China. They can trust Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue to continue to take on China and hold them accountable.

I encourage everyone who wishes to help to visit [GABattleground.com](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xhktjht-fuutjhhtj-j/) and to volunteer in Georgia. Let's make sure we send Kelly and David back to the Senate.

Best,Bill Hagerty | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xhktjht-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xhktjht-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xhktjht-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xhktjht-fuutjhhtj-u/)

body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, DECEMBER 8, 2020 BREAKING: RAPHAEL WARNOCK'S WRITINGS REVEAL HIS SUPPORT FOR MARXISM
ATLANTA - After Radical Liberal Raphael Warnock flat-out [refused](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRKehNTp48Uo86tvO_wQ3oe54jA900R3-I2ZK1rwY_7ZP32yxic6ATFmf1fI50zgrRJmz_o9OeokdvFsBeuSKWPjKBNacW2k9mAACsxoJRPdGAtg71XoOkSIK3jNERG9vMs7SHyneLN4gIsJK9UbmQ8V8ltZPPKustzWdbJ4baulXPo9rEj_wmUA==&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==) to [renounce](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRg2H89AZeqP3nGUqmSQyxnrugstwJf1ECJJSMd8xiPsBwdhjH-rLT3YGiiyi3Ut845pYxEArxQilR_tqfLJ8uF984EpskyJ875Wq-8UGcxhgB_ZBL2WOHxcQl2-dZ1z9H_9kPEJENI-Sw2hzopi-ZFTgF6RnD1ENELoF7D2T2jdRJ8V9A1XruGg==&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==) socialism and Marxism in last night's debate, new evidence reveals just how strongly Warnock embraces these radical ideologies.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRKehNTp48Uo86tvO_wQ3oe54jA900R3-I2ZK1rwY_7ZP32yxic6ATFmf1fI50zgrRJmz_o9OeokdvFsBeuSKWPjKBNacW2k9mAACsxoJRPdGAtg71XoOkSIK3jNERG9vMs7SHyneLN4gIsJK9UbmQ8V8ltZPPKustzWdbJ4baulXPo9rEj_wmUA==&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==)
---
| Raphael Warnock's writings, teachings and record all reveal his outward, unabashed support for Marxism and socialism. Warnock:

* [Stated](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRMIQAM-pnnB40tCvxHemT9SWFjtQIBOUa5q29IP9HrDGcXES9az7gqzlAUtCMPV2QjDXgesrjM4ccqGmTrr7ngCnEwuXsOI8vMO53hJopmwgjrASXL3YoPE1fxmJQw_lM5GG8sqBjMWag4ITBGk6ZBaJ-R6ilG839KqJfRp-ol6A=&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==) that "the Marxist Critique has much to teach the black church"
* [Criticized](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRMIQAM-pnnB40tCvxHemT9SWFjtQIBOUa5q29IP9HrDGcXES9az7gqzlAUtCMPV2QjDXgesrjM4ccqGmTrr7ngCnEwuXsOI8vMO53hJopmwgjrASXL3YoPE1fxmJQw_lM5GG8sqBjMWag4ITBGk6ZBaJ-R6ilG839KqJfRp-ol6A=&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==) another author for "trivializ[ing] black struggle against the obduracy of white capitalist forces"
* [Claimed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNR8TMUl-gUaX_ccV-ckBeEktzcn-s930IwLFkqUgZ2lJxNi2Ugem02NfPiK0M_vGL9A4p_Eh_EZhcSRJZQ0wlibpEIoKWnnbnTZ8x1PVMYJEQIhLJgfimeCQSKmAYs8SQYpmFNbuySAJAIzXnylGcMY50m2A6UIgyyjxoQ98-1hVYi5wqb3o4Aw7XWI0sTP4PMAdtLXQ3V8oLPW9Mi4U-A-segjK_x4YW7ieFH_jIfYqN47RVKqk8Iny_hDWBca-K7&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==) the "white church" was "complicit" in "white supremacy" and "slavery"
* [Said](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRxKuXc0DULyzEtyNtmeJQY836UMNN5kxrdCGhO1vhMHmOfsbGkcCoYC5m17-z2qVnOIOnNB7Ct9by7VyvIWzxC4Q3QyY1QVeU8q3shkX49dZWa3Yjpv-iaeZBXuDYkyAz6SfO3TK_drQyE-kJKDmtRURrQJZ81K9dR4XvJRhjs1E=&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==) the black middle class should pay more attention to the "hard questions about the distribution of wealth"

But it gets even worse. Cone [defended](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNR7K7VvO4TWSDYPcEfYpbKbLgAl-ovjuI8oh23fcV_WSm9dH9bxnR8F7n-En9JaUIwJwCM5Rm7cHD_aVnzg-eHQ85UPjK0agxFY2_Ao7-XqE-ZPkrQaW0Fu_D8IJ6qwqMRydQ1LyFlvyci_dtr_oPTryN_n7OBGYIMCypmMIJUxD7XMt-qNebuFA==&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==) Marxism and called for a "total reconstruction of society along the lines of Democratic Socialism." | BACKGROUND:
In His 2014 Book The Divided Mind of the Black Church, Warnock Praised Marxism - Warnock Wrote, "To Be Sure, the Marxist Critique Has Much to Teach the Black Church" and Went on to Praise Marxism's Role in "the Maturation of Black Theology" by Showing "Interconnectivity of Racial and Class Oppression." (Raphael Warnock, The Divided Mind of the Black Church, 2014, [pp.83-84](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRMIQAM-pnnB40tCvxHemT9SWFjtQIBOUa5q29IP9HrDGcXES9az7gqzlAUtCMPV2QjDXgesrjM4ccqGmTrr7ngCnEwuXsOI8vMO53hJopmwgjrASXL3YoPE1fxmJQw_lM5GG8sqBjMWag4ITBGk6ZBaJ-R6ilG839KqJfRp-ol6A=&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==))
In his 2014 book The Divided Mind of the Black Church, Warnock criticized another author's analysis of religious faith and the civil rights movement by saying it "trivializes black struggle against the obduracy of white capitalist forces." (Raphael Warnock, The Divided Mind of the Black Church, 2014, [pp. 83-84](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRMIQAM-pnnB40tCvxHemT9SWFjtQIBOUa5q29IP9HrDGcXES9az7gqzlAUtCMPV2QjDXgesrjM4ccqGmTrr7ngCnEwuXsOI8vMO53hJopmwgjrASXL3YoPE1fxmJQw_lM5GG8sqBjMWag4ITBGk6ZBaJ-R6ilG839KqJfRp-ol6A=&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==))
Warnock's 2014 Book Passage Praising Marxism and Complaining about "White Capitalism" also Appears in His 2006 Doctoral Dissertation, "The Mission of the Black Church." Warnock's 2014 book passage praising Marxism also appears in his 2006 doctoral dissertation, The Mission of the Black Church. (Raphael Gamaliel Warnock, "The Mission of the Black Church: A Discussion Among Black Theologians and Black Pastors," Union Theological Seminary, New York City, Spring 2006, [pp. 2](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNR8TMUl-gUaX_ccV-ckBeEktzcn-s930IwLFkqUgZ2lJxNi2Ugem02NfPiK0M_vGL9A4p_Eh_EZhcSRJZQ0wlibpEIoKWnnbnTZ8x1PVMYJEQIhLJgfimeCQSKmAYs8SQYpmFNbuySAJAIzXnylGcMY50m2A6UIgyyjxoQ98-1hVYi5wqb3o4Aw7XWI0sTP4PMAdtLXQ3V8oLPW9Mi4U-A-segjK_x4YW7ieFH_jIfYqN47RVKqk8Iny_hDWBca-K7&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==))
In His 2006 Doctoral Dissertation, "The Mission of the Black Church," Warnock Notes the "Complicity and Active Participation in Slavery, Segregation and other Manifestations of White Supremacy" of "White Churches." In his 2006 doctoral dissertation The Mission of the Black Church, Warnock says that "white churches" are always part of black theology's "analysis" because of "their complicity and active participation in slavery, segregation and other manifestations of white supremacy." (Raphael Gamaliel Warnock, "The Mission of the Black Church: A Discussion Among Black Theologians and Black Pastors," Union Theological Seminary, New York City, Spring 2006, [pp. 2](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNR8TMUl-gUaX_ccV-ckBeEktzcn-s930IwLFkqUgZ2lJxNi2Ugem02NfPiK0M_vGL9A4p_Eh_EZhcSRJZQ0wlibpEIoKWnnbnTZ8x1PVMYJEQIhLJgfimeCQSKmAYs8SQYpmFNbuySAJAIzXnylGcMY50m2A6UIgyyjxoQ98-1hVYi5wqb3o4Aw7XWI0sTP4PMAdtLXQ3V8oLPW9Mi4U-A-segjK_x4YW7ieFH_jIfYqN47RVKqk8Iny_hDWBca-K7&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==))
In a 2014 NPR Interview With Michel Martin, Warnock Criticized the "Burgeoning Black Middle Class" and the "Black Church" for Their Role in the "Narcissism and Mindless Consumeristic Impulses of America" - Saying More Attention Should Be Paid to the "Hard Questions about the Distribution of Wealth." In this interview, Warnock talked about the need for African American churches to focus on liberal political issues and criticized "prosperity gospel preaching" as a "distortion of the gospel." Following his criticism of "prosperity gospel preaching," Warnock launched into a larger criticism of other African-American religious leaders, which he called collectively the "Black Church." Warnock criticized the "Black Church" and the "Burgeoning Black Middle Class" for failing to stand up against American capitalism - saying "I think that with the burgeoning black middle class in the decades since the Civil Rights Movement, [the Black Church] has too often given in to the kind of narcissism and mindless consumeristic impulses of America without asking the hard questions about the distribution of wealth, about the broadening chasm between the haves and have nots." ("Taking The Black Church Back To Its Roots," [NPR](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRxKuXc0DULyzEtyNtmeJQY836UMNN5kxrdCGhO1vhMHmOfsbGkcCoYC5m17-z2qVnOIOnNB7Ct9by7VyvIWzxC4Q3QyY1QVeU8q3shkX49dZWa3Yjpv-iaeZBXuDYkyAz6SfO3TK_drQyE-kJKDmtRURrQJZ81K9dR4XvJRhjs1E=&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==), 1/10/2014)
In his book, The Divided Mind of the Black Church, Warnock wrote about how he was influenced by the writings of Dr. James Cone. During Warnock's senior year in high school, Warnock wrote a paper on Cone's book, For My People: Black Theology and the Black Church. Warnock wrote in Divided Mind of the Black Church that Cone was his "academic adviser and mentor." Warnock wrote that Cone was specifically his "doctoral adviser in systematic theology at Union Theological Seminary." Warnock also called Cone "the father of black theology." (Raphael Warnock, The Divided Mind of the Black Church, 2014, pp. [xi](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRLCgEcZIBCgM44Ex51xq5Yz76AvU0NglhFcZoCzOK4Xp8F5D2-H1AgvlROoOrsNzH14oqhIoXVFIO6-p9zZlSrKNnuEmChgISVzo49NOLPOB-MGvw4RQ5z7Txbm1Vi0oaw_V3qKl2nhYgED3OkTEt_F6l7IJk3SZn0dHCFvvxLoErNLA5Tn34ZEeSHsJPQqgB87ujJPdk6ZwHaq8sqN3O9POEPM-xJTpUUCpmwxJcTHmnTSEzBr_4MXK7_Pl8do7qIhFR86eN4Jv61EZbwEKkG0nQeRNldPycXWjoMKPPUPnbmK685qOahxdNe3ObHhEmk11Tkt-pmVpucbVtjHIk1LwEBvUPHqQv7MftQwgzexMdcl7Tme_SkYTzg0cdT-dlniCw-WH0uKAv3-WTJ46odvn4xi7bihNKqfkumcdyK6qbrEJooOq-G3iC3deJAan0Ey02rreWDHRpMty-8ctAGPhUjpKmgxzUy9ad7p-iGt1hf9yloQFiQZLbRSq_Q6_tV0s90v6p9aASZ7NE4-2DLKUV0V7JRUA0GmIzev_BKHxYzIPvP1CVhBEwEZSeOgJSV8Qh81aHUjW4vZi2d8lnM8Ey0urxOqN8-8i7ll2ajlFkcu3b-h00GZBS3GEJqpDo7IBFLJWNkJhQOdVhtoo8aViqIxrF4obBYr9kckuEsASo5n_fcneh4nakowdc5iDmqHOl88VdU1dKKAefLeZHrk-RzoL1A-NZxRevo1wyAwN5UIyejmyKebIYU_WZo5BODRmq7kjv3eGo_cFqQr8ngZ8sZXPW5CkQqPxP9534lSoZTjzmyfJnn-o7U484RZDLCjHGRHPw1wu2eY32P09nmTzxHm81QQ8WzLVCJdMaFTc8S7fm_qvRadT2wjgwUEfEUXJ6GLwscg5Cd4WgYEPkR-lmraz3pKMk3Y21jIQa28f8d_USMIK6QXciX-7_eO1WG4lYounXCRec0BI59QhP9F51E8RPW-3Rwma8jnyzZ66QNxKwZk_NQmg8Y8yFCRxN9IScC75uvHTts6MSPtyMDPLY4zs9mrICIhEUl_JQq-x6vxaqVIYdBsPW28CnXlsw0JtxHGW1Vys-fBAs8AIEANNig_6EQCv2CiqAD7OZeymleQURgJON-Yau7UYRtBGtgG_E5E8briaoug250WT8zaW_vV_Sfoc1wEbXQtzbVYE5BikKZwJvDU3Am-hbCgDVEEsZekxq2LU1KV-F8MtY665zdF4thi5fmFZH0vqixj-JtuJYlfFoqK0dscHCU1ripVjsiV05HMQ=&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==), [6-7](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRwVnCOYx1BvSvJVnmqbuf1RJNPEg163YEHZP5FdCsItE3e4hAQ6mWwtWqzPNKxYJ2p3kZWHqmwy_IiTt3g-vUYfH-rRK0xTpKsW7ak4NyTCfgraRWTm7atKxQkBBUV1FyzXvxS6hBPOAo6fjqrDnpS0xnFFlBfW8TMXAKta3GNII=&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==))
In His 2006 Doctoral Dissertation, The Mission of the Black Church, Cone Is Listed as Warnock's Academic Advisor - In His Acknowledgements, Warnock Wrote, "Dr. Cone Has Taught Me More about the Rigor of Intellectual Inquiry...than Anybody Else." (Raphael Gamaliel Warnock, "The Mission of the Black Church: A Discussion Among Black Theologians and Black Pastors" - Doctoral Dissertation-, Union Theological Seminary, New York City, Spring 2006, [pp. v-vi](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNR8TMUl-gUaX_ccV-ckBeEktzcn-s930IwLFkqUgZ2lJxNi2Ugem02NfPiK0M_vGL9A4p_Eh_EZhcSRJZQ0wlibpEIoKWnnbnTZ8x1PVMYJEQIhLJgfimeCQSKmAYs8SQYpmFNbuySAJAIzXnylGcMY50m2A6UIgyyjxoQ98-1hVYi5wqb3o4Aw7XWI0sTP4PMAdtLXQ3V8oLPW9Mi4U-A-segjK_x4YW7ieFH_jIfYqN47RVKqk8Iny_hDWBca-K7&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==))
In 1980, Cone Authored an Essay Entitled "The Black Church and Marxism: What Do They Have to Say to Each Other" - Cone Wrote the Essay for a Seminar Put on by Democratic Socialist Organizing Committee. Cone Said Marxism Is "Right in Its Critique of Capitalism" and Called on Black Churches to "Take a Stand against Capitalism and for Democratic Socialism." Cone argued for the Black church to embrace Marxism. Cone specifically wrote: "We can indigenize Marxism, that is, reinterpret it for our situation. We do not refuse to ride in cars or airplanes, nor do we reject any other useful instrument just because they were invented by whites. Why then should we reject Marxism if it proves to be of use in our struggle for freedom?" Cone also called for "the total reconstruction of society along the lines of Democratic Socialism." (Dr. James Cone, ["The Black Church and Marxism: What Do They Have To Say To Each Other,"](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNR7K7VvO4TWSDYPcEfYpbKbLgAl-ovjuI8oh23fcV_WSm9dH9bxnR8F7n-En9JaUIwJwCM5Rm7cHD_aVnzg-eHQ85UPjK0agxFY2_Ao7-XqE-ZPkrQaW0Fu_D8IJ6qwqMRydQ1LyFlvyci_dtr_oPTryN_n7OBGYIMCypmMIJUxD7XMt-qNebuFA==&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==) 1980)
Warnock's Bibliography for His 2014 Book Includes 34 Separate Works by the Marxist Academic James Cone - Including "The Black Church and Marxism: What Do They Have to Say to Each Other?" (1980), "Black Christians and Marxism" (1986), and "Black Theology and Marxism" (1986). In his 2014 book The Divided Mind of the Black Church, Warnock includes a bibliography of his sources. This bibliography includes 34 separate publications written by the late Dr. James Cone, Warnock's mentor and former faculty advisor at Union Theological Seminary. (Raphael Warnock, The Divided Mind of the Black Church, 2014, [pp. 233](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRtPqTfBfMX6tAA0Sh56nkYhj1ZeKdN9SOPrL9Jw-Vtca1ipV_iJ4uldsFL5ALmqvTQkU_njR-uhsCSewfZZ3CQnNyk5NHPyo0XR2QVVf-3hAncborjUXk3VA3cHF-5-R_N1AjauG2OEAHdf3peKoJ19_T6AQYb-gpoBsHAKb7DXU=&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==))
When Praising Marxism in His 2014 Book, Warnock Cited to Three Marxist Works by Cone - "The Black Church and Marxism: What Do They Have to Say to Each Other?" (1980), "Black Christians and Marxism" (1986), and "Black Theology and Marxism" (1986). In Endnote #31 Warnock also points out that "no one had a greater impact on the incorporation of Marxist analysis into the black theological framework than Cornel West. West and Cone were colleagues at Union Theological Seminary in the 1980s, and they taught several classes together on 'black theology and Marxist thought.'" (Raphael Warnock, The Divided Mind of the Black Church, 2014, [pp. 212-213](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRzdWP4qXUF0llBK-ExJlFsJaE6UnaqMst4Y1SQ4AJodA4V7Xf_lJ8soc9PB4YDF432-TQgnP6sxlgHdt04Du3zs1IWhsrWKRz090jjshwytD8SdDarh33jVkIYcz3Jrx5tVmwStnR8T787ZP8HsCoCJlOfyQlWxN-4SkuhfDx2x_u4E8sPcJzPW-U8aH6B4BhqYUCXJ17zABO6ggsqjBBZyS5GjqFjJ06XCCTLj4fwLP-n-I3tsQ_uuBHfvol0NpOU8LhfUHbUDQZ6MtZs1sBbClLw2mZurpQmq43J3mf91Chmc8ZSnmweFcczNvEQxsXbwgBbpOP2qtXCXKuHO8iOT1RYljkd6idxr3sUtZSAOQoWd6danu8g2cEZ0lpHA-XC0zrMcGA-em2pxGnd1A3hRmX5KVw0872VmzS2P1NJdCk5dvylA04xY52DEkcVD48vh2LUWIEhzm-Ca9olMLghgw4LuPBJMhmfWy-rO-dXmzwW_FNxegJW-YBISJYHHPvGpeViBlUilwtAUzv5YUYr-2-3TKW34sWAc1b_ZwYWOFXFBNgllu9_mRFmD_swOqlNh7Tfj7ox5B5lxsr0qDafe5HtNQosS_gQUPzJjAB-TqvMF-M7bEoDX_-9GRSNoESDh7joJuoHyrGc3zpYQv5oC-6aEy2OwSDjRQHylnqltWspke9rEBYALCXftXRXvsrIipdlWbb_v5c3sjB9CjLJLXlvx-tb2LSQ4gBwxbKaOLnPHV_lji2tHlP1K7w7AS4dRGnYNeVjNzxSmuCOClevEFa1iAECciDIjdXvhLmEMJcTlohejft0fK8bkOmdrtK&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==))
In His Book, The Divided Mind of the Black Church, Warnock Wrote that Cone Claimed the White Church Was "the Antichrist" and "the Enemy of the Christ" - Warnock Also Wrote that Cone's Characterization Was Due to the White Church's "Active Support of Slavery and Segregation in the Society." In his book, The Divided Mind of the Black Church, Warnock Wrote that Cone claimed the white church was "the antichrist" and "the enemy of the Christ." Warnock wrote that Cone blamed this characterization of the white church due to the church's "historical sacralization and active support of slavery and segregation in the society and its creation and maintenance of the conditions under which an independent black church had to emerge." (Raphael Warnock, The Divided Mind of the Black Church, 2014, [pp. 91](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYIrwLLYpkXMmCP7OQf6aiYdTfgX81LPK9UbB-FPrKdOkLHBpxFqnT8_0YVTEQNRu7bTfiIopG953bgrI1dG_Ulx7Y96Hu5xZFAU8GL545_tYTWdYq8GA2EFWdQ7gYaqoAPkZWbJzWn476yf072qnah6Co0_Cu2cr-9q-f7thMwGXT0QOeijs2UEawUEdG7ApPRKE8v3gEjHc2gWRs-v7VznnmLnA2su-7MrPaCcYEk=&c=MOdIcnLQSkh3m8iLXC_PkGyASlyPw_YcJjMmY3P0WEqas_SySJiORQ==&ch=CMG7mBWCMcFqIszaj7hTB0etSFJyn2P6Ziei2jE1GOdWZWvAhJYjiw==))
Following the Death of Cone in 2018, the News Show Democracy Now Invited Warnock, as a Former Student of Cone, to Speak about Cone - Warnock Praised Cone's Legacy and Said Cone "Spoke with the Power and the Moral Authority of a Prophet." subject: Pelosi must be stopped
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X6Gdtcy2zYKI9ppnGqBe6hgK51M2TDMNR75hbKE4NZfe_A-6lg6ykW40aWS_3_FKBcXLen1mZkwOMSzVE-1xc0L5DQh0-PTYgga9gYEavFhZkUMX_sBrJ17ahLA-UJ6P4qyysvDMLGLVKfHkUKZtvfD6I2N9TrPF62aZiPZcZINIboZC8OzOeNnc2_md69LA&c=j2ff8E8sh4LpqEg9aiBfbQSaXaA0kWaVfo5TUPyXRSZPUVMO853Gxw==&ch=c7RRhtUvTxRtB6DGPbH7EU_Jn6cqbgY8CqsPoQpdN4z_R6K-2BzGfA==)

| Peter,
As Speaker of the House the past two years, Nancy Pelosi has led some of the most outrageous and partisan sideshows while the American people suffered from COVID-19.
While the coronavirus was reaching our shores, Pelosi led a hoax impeachment investigation about a perfectly normal phone call. She then used COVID-19 relief as a way to jam through parts of her far-left agenda while bailing out her liberal pals. She shamefully held up direct relief to Americans because she wanted to bail out blue states.
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: GA Senate Runoffs, Stop the Steal, and Pearl Harbor Day: Week of December 7th Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
This week’s call to action includes helping with the Georgia Senate runoff races and supporting President Trump’s efforts to stop the steal.

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Along with ensuring all legal votes are counted and only legal votes are counted in the state of Georgia, we have been preparing for the 2021 Georgia run-off election.

While we don’t buy the early predictions from the Mainstream Media, if Joe Biden does win the Presidency, the Senate will serve as our final bulwark against progressive tyranny.

Democrats have a slim majority in the House of Representatives, so if they win the Presidency and the run-off elections, they will have complete control of the U.S. Government. This will allow them to pass their radical socialist policy proposals with ease.

We cannot allow that to happen. That’s why, regardless of the results of the Presidential election, [we must ensure the Senate stays in conservative control](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQzLTUyYWY1YWQ0YzEwZjQzOTFiOGVjNmIzMzNmYzM1ZWFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZngwNlZIVGJFRkZBTE41TGVsUHc1SFBiSnZqdS1QN19kZ3BOTTNHeUdLOTU4eWJRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MzA5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=BqHzX3lAd2S9ieIXX4tAng).

Your voice and your vote this January matters.
|
---
GET OUT THE VOTE IN GEORGIA!
Right now, volunteers can print out and mail letters to voters in Georgia about why they should vote for David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler. Soon, we will have opportunities to text message and call voters as well. Please sign up today to help Get Out The Vote in Georgia!!
[SECURE THE SENATE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQzLTUyYWY1YWQ0YzEwZjQzOTFiOGVjNmIzMzNmYzM1ZWFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZngwNlZIVGJFRkZBTE41TGVsUHc1SFBiSnZqdS1QN19kZ3BOTTNHeUdLOTU4eWJRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MzA5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=mdoEkIeGGe2FJtE4MYQQEw)
|
---
Last week’s Georgia Senate Government Oversight Committee hearing on potential election fraud proved exactly what we’ve been saying all along: the 2020 election was rife with fraud and a complete, transparent recount process is needed.

Following the hearing, Georgia Governor Brian Kemp is calling for a signature audit of the state’s election results.

Governor Kemp called the evidence produced at the hearing, “concerning.”

While this is a good first step in our effort to #ProtectTheVote, Governor Kemp must do more. He has the power via the state constitution to get this signature audit going now. He does not need to wait for the Secretary of State to do it.

We will not rest until we ensure the vote is protected in Georgia, and across the entire nation. The future of our republic depends on the work we do now, to ensure election transparency and trust in the process.

Make sure to stay informed and updated through our emails and calls to action, so that you can help!
|
---
MUST-SHARE TESTIMONIALS OF ELECTION FRAUD & CORRUPTION

If you do not have social media accounts, please email them to your email list. Simply copy and paste the link to the You Tube playlist into your social media accounts or into an email.
STOP THE STEAL
**CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVE & SENATORS **
America’s survival as a Republic is at stake. As you know, this year, Socialist Democrats exploited numerous, systemic election system flaws to engage in massive voter fraud and election theft on an unprecedented scale.

Please call your Representative and both of your Senators to demand that they formally object to, and vote to reject, the Electoral College vote submissions states whose election system flaws render their reported Electoral College vote submissions unworthy of support.
**Sample Script**
_Hello, my name is**[You Name]** , and I am a constituent calling from **[Your City, State]**. Due to the overwhelming examples of election fraud, I demand that you, on January 6, formally object to, and vote to reject, the electoral college vote submissions of Nevada, Georgia, Pennsylvania and every other state whose election system flaws render their reported electoral college vote submissions unworthy of support. If you do not fight for America, I will fight you. Thank you._
**RALLIES TO STOP THE STEAL & MORE**
**Check out the events on our**[**Protect the Vote page**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQzLTUyYWY1YWQ0YzEwZjQzOTFiOGVjNmIzMzNmYzM1ZWFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdC10aGUtdm90ZS8_bWlkPTQzMDkxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=vRyqaiRt3uR0UbAGRKquTA) – there are rallies to protect the Senate, as well as other kinds of pro-America events!

Rallies are still happening all over the nation to #StopTheSteal, so **please be sure check[StoptheSteal.us](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQzLTUyYWY1YWQ0YzEwZjQzOTFiOGVjNmIzMzNmYzM1ZWFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zdG9wdGhlc3RlYWwudXMvP21pZD00MzA5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=iJB_c6j34b8Pl_flmlyrSw) often** to see if there is a rally happening in your state, so that you can show President Trump your support!
|

Democrat wanna-be tyrants slowly feel their power slipping away. As we continue to make tremendous progress in our recovery from the devastating social and economic effects of the coronavirus, Democrats feel the false sense of control they had over their constituents slipping away...

And there's nothing that those in power hate more, than losing their power, regardless of whether the power they felt was real or a mere figment of their imagination. And local Democrat “leaders” that imposed overreaching lockdown orders are no different.

So, what are they doing to stop this feeling of losing power? Enacting more restrictions, curfews, and all-encompassing lockdowns orders.

Just as small businesses and American workers across our nation were beginning on the road to recovery, local Democrat “leaders” desperate for power are trying to rip the rug out from underneath their feet.

And our message to the wanna-be tyrants is abundantly clear: we will not submit to your unscientific lockdowns and restrictions. To those patriots taking a stand for your liberty, we stand with you.
|
---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of December 7th
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

This week, keep American history alive for your children or grandchildren by teaching them about the attack on Pearl Harbor in 1941. **As yesterday was Pearl Harbor Remembrance Day, we want to use this week to teach young Americans about that day.**

Again, one of the fundamental goals of the radical left, in every country where they exist, is to erase history. This, in turn, allows them to erase the real meaning of civics, and therefore, destroy the foundations of a country and its founding values.

Linked below are some wonderful resources that you can use to teach and talk about Pearl Harbor Remembrance Day, and what happened in 1941. There are short summaries of what happened, worksheets you can print out – including coloring sheets for younger children, and more.

[Pearl Harbor for Kids – Lesson Plan and Worksheets](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQzLTUyYWY1YWQ0YzEwZjQzOTFiOGVjNmIzMzNmYzM1ZWFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud29vanIuY29tL3BlYXJsLWhhcmJvci1mb3ItY2hpbGRyZW4tbGVzc29uLXBsYW4tYW5kLXdvcmtzaGVldHMvP21pZD00MzA5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=hidOQIqrYW92XRFO7uWlIg)

[The Homeschool Mom – Resources about Pearl Harbor](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQzLTUyYWY1YWQ0YzEwZjQzOTFiOGVjNmIzMzNmYzM1ZWFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlaG9tZXNjaG9vbG1vbS5jb20vaG9tZXNjaG9vbC1sZXNzb24tcGxhbnMvcGVhcmwtaGFyYm9yLz9taWQ9NDMwOTEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=E_n2HuqV7iJCe3s1l57KOA) (this one includes a link to footage from that day – maybe more appropriate for older kids)

[Pearl Harbor Visitors Bureau Educational Resources](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQzLTUyYWY1YWQ0YzEwZjQzOTFiOGVjNmIzMzNmYzM1ZWFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly92aXNpdHBlYXJsaGFyYm9yLm9yZy9lZHVjYXRpb25hbC1yZXNvdXJjZXMvP21pZD00MzA5MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=o6bxcu3l4wQkKNjpsOUYGw)

[How to teach about Pearl Harbor in your homeschool](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQzLTUyYWY1YWQ0YzEwZjQzOTFiOGVjNmIzMzNmYzM1ZWFi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJpZ2h0aWRlYXNwcmVzcy5jb20vMjAxOC8xMi90ZWFjaC1wZWFybC1oYXJib3ItaG9tZXNjaG9vbC8_bWlkPTQzMDkxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=PoYtHSWXhoM1ePc9y9Tvjw) (you don’t have to be homeschooling to use these ideas – this site has ideas of what to show/teach kids, as well as links)

Jenny Beth

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Hannity to Georgians: We Need You
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e708a4c8d069/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66695?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Hannity to Georgians: We Need You**_
---
| Folks -

**Sean Hannity knows what’s at stake in this election. **

**HANNITY:**_**“**[If] Republicans lose in Georgia, every gain that the president has made, every historic achievement will be in serious jeopardy. And the last four years of hard work [will go] down the tubes... This election is critical. Georgia and the people of Georgia, even though they have every right to be disgusted and may not have all the answers, they need to go to the polls for the sake of the country... We need you.”_

**Sean is exactly right. Watch the video below and share it with 5 Georgia voters.**
_Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d9efab768d&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e35ea6faba&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=695d75872b&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **We had an awesome Saturday night in Valdosta with President Trump!**

**PRESIDENT TRUMP:**_“You have two of the greatest people on earth that have to hold the line... These seats are the last line of defense to save America and protect all that we have accomplished... The election is about David Perdue, one of the greats, and Kelly Loeffler, a person who is just unbelievable._

_“On January 5, you must defeat Ossoff and Warnock and send two great people - David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler - back to the Senate. Monday, December 7, you have to register to vote. Go to www.georgia.gov and register immediately, and then request your absentee ballot.

“We need each of you, every one of you, your friends and family to go and vote!”_

**Click[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=36e937a3d3&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the Georgia GOP’s video from the Valdosta Rally.**
_Click[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=105dd191e2&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c2713c1335&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1e3d4ece5d&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| This Thursday, Vice President Pence will be back in Georgia for another **Defend the Majority Rally** to highlight what's at stake in these elections and the importance of getting out the vote!
**Thursday, December 10**
**DOORS OPEN: 12:30 PM**
**EVENT STARTS: 2:00 PM**
1501 Aviation Way
Augusta, GA 30906
---
| [GET TICKETS](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0456573417&e=02cd889ad3 "GET TICKETS")
---
| **Last night, Senator David Perdue joined Sean Spicer on Newsmax to discuss what’s at stake in Georgia.

SPICER: **_“I'm a team player. If we don't win, your point is exactly right: AOC and Chuck Schumer get the steering wheel and they start driving, and everything that President Trump has done over four years gets undone one piece by one piece...

“I remember being at Trump Tower during the campaign in 2016. It was David Perdue that was out there saying, ‘What else can I do to help?’ when it wasn't popular. I just think people in Georgia, you need to know that... David Perdue has been there since the beginning and we need to keep him there to continue to fight.”_

**PERDUE:**_“The majority of the Senate is very critical. It's all on the line here in Georgia... What Schumer is saying in his own words... ‘take Georgia, change America.’ AOC echoed the same thing a couple days later and said you know. We need those two seats in Georgia because we don't want to negotiate. We will get the Green New Deal without compromise. When people hear that, they'll show up and they realize what's at stake here. We're out there right now making sure that they understand how important it is that we get these votes back out in January.” _

**Click[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b5285be582&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the segment.**
_Click[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0c93895135&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=feb8edecb0&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=314c8815d4&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **Senator Perdue has been traveling across all of Georgia on the Save Georgia, Win America Bus Tour! **

Check out some of our recent stops...
_**Floyd County with Dan Crenshaw**_
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=65a8ab1a1d&e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
_**Cobb County**_
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=5009aa99ef&e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
**_Paulding County_**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=aa982ebfb2&e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
**We're counting on your help to win this race. Chip in below!**

---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d6b2ab9fb6&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW!")

| [VOLUNTEER](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=89d81d5d0c&e=02cd889ad3 "VOLUNTEER")

subject: Tell Mitch McConnell: COVID relief is crucial >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3eJLHyprWSFMmi_IRvdXcyZ21L_4VrN_Mly-0nfF7w=/KF9FxRsLf3NQpWVHvHbJEny_K_xymJNv15H4b7B06o0=)
While working Americans have been forced to default on their mortgages, shutter their small businesses, and drain their savings as a result of COVID-19, our Republican-controlled Senate has sat by and done _nothing._
Under Mitch McConnell's leadership, the Senate has left working people out to dry during one of the _worst health crises in our nation 's history.__ _ Americans deserve better; they deserve comprehensive financial relief, _not_ a one-time payment of $1,200.
[**If you, like me, believe the Senate has a _responsibility_ to pass a COVID-19 relief bill for everyday Americans, please sign your name to our petition >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3eJLHyprWSFMmi_IRvdXcyZ21L_4VrN_Mly-0nfF7w=/OsE2PwJGJpCubNQyQEe6MYvAC7qhl11ZG2dXO2Reuvo=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3eJLHyprWSFMmi_IRvdXcyZ21L_4VrN_Mly-0nfF7w=/OsE2PwJGJpCubNQyQEe6MYvAC7qhl11ZG2dXO2Reuvo=)
The wealthiest Americans have seen their net-worths increase over the last 10 months, while working people have been scraping to get by. This is economic injustice at its worst.
That's why, in May, the House passed the _HEROES Act_ , which would get financial relief to millions of struggling families. Since then, the Senate found the time to somehow appoint a new Supreme Court Justice, yet ignore the immediate needs of everyday Americans.
We **NEED** a relief bill and we **NEED** it _now._
[**Help us tell the Senate that the time for COVID-19 relief is NOW | ADD YOUR NAME >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3eJLHyprWSFMmi_IRvdXcyZ21L_4VrN_Mly-0nfF7w=/OsE2PwJGJpCubNQyQEe6MYvAC7qhl11ZG2dXO2Reuvo=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3eJLHyprWSFMmi_IRvdXcyZ21L_4VrN_Mly-0nfF7w=/OsE2PwJGJpCubNQyQEe6MYvAC7qhl11ZG2dXO2Reuvo=)
Thanks for taking action,
_\-- Linda S anchez_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3eJLHyprWSFMmi_IRvdXcyZ21L_4VrN_Mly-0nfF7w=/whTnWG297akxi13_5zZmLjP3-oWzV2WxbkErsBeB6p8=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/n3eJLHyprWSFMmi_IRvdXcyZ21L_4VrN_Mly-0nfF7w=/9rd3C5M-GCF4haImJH23zvp73ZoheRkuyIrgTwhuwgI=)_ _

* * *

name: Team Van Drew
subject: Guess what, Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Drew for Congress
body:
Did you know that Congressman Van Drew is approaching his one year anniversary of walking away from the Democrat Party and becoming a Republican?

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019NiX6rvRAdkWUbDg8PDhXSe1LI5SeGFmLawU5kTNxh4gREwka4vjXQSF35G3tNiLqZoXNvp75FYWIxgtAmOp5J6rgQf_TDaUqXA1Ck753HoHVovxgYJdAVzrVWKCYKT1lypqQFXb6bow2L5CgZRp6Gi1BislAmSvJbroh332ba1r0wLMEMvM0KEs9hPurG-M_LArVT5n3UFS3wm-0IBTQ0KhVO8Ft4AJbY6fsIZjaJeZeKYECi59TRVQNhZjGLhKnHWXQgVngZHudMsasym8s_QLAWLbqC59vFVSjARcLZw_vWX_ujlB-L36SHqUXz6upwblgIMRL6LvjiJYLTRYkWUbkIRRktq92uvRi5CPJzrCQRUu36xeoLCU69yh5spSUVqpjZzO8uW1QQlWQX1bPFtGX4x1mEth0EU1nFxpYxP9B-TN5Vb-Ag==&c=epiOGTQjrrXCRCMdgl_H-90rhrwpZwg3UZ4SxVwhvZs_Ijuf-5Hi1g==&ch=56JZjacrAc3rPHNjpAUNQO2eseNwLHRDSD2ASGXz9eOdiqhdSCycDw==)
Friend,
Did you know that Congressman Van Drew is approaching his one year anniversary of walking away from the Democrat Party and becoming a Republican?
When the Radical Left was doing everything they could to impeach President Trump, it became clear to Jeff that the Democrats cared more about politics than doing what was right for America. THAT is why Congressman Van Drew walked away from the Democrat Party and joined the Republican Party to fight for a Strong America and a Strong South Jersey.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The freeze is coming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We can't fundraise for at least three months.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8225%2E868730%2EEOwc1D) Friend, The freeze is coming -- that's why I wanted to reach out right now. Friday is the last day to make sure we have the resources needed to get through the upcoming legislative session. Friday at midnight all donations must stop for at least 90 days. It's the last time you'll get a fundraising email from me for the next three months, and we have huge plans to combat climate change, create more economic opportunity, and respond to the COVID-19 crisis in Washington state while Washington, D.C. continues to stall. **Our opponents who want to organize against progress can still accept money hand-over-fist while legislators work hard in Olympia -- that's why I'm reaching out.[We have a pre-freeze goal of raising $30,000 by midnight on Friday: Will you donate $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13897?t=4&akid=8225%2E868730%2EEOwc1D)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13898?t=5&akid=8225%2E868730%2EEOwc1D)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13899?t=6&akid=8225%2E868730%2EEOwc1D)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13900?t=7&akid=8225%2E868730%2EEOwc1D)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13901?t=8&akid=8225%2E868730%2EEOwc1D)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13902?t=9&akid=8225%2E868730%2EEOwc1D)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13897?t=10&akid=8225%2E868730%2EEOwc1D)
---
I'm so proud of the work we're doing here in Washington state: We're taking monumental steps to set the foundation for the next generation of progressive leaders and the future of the climate movement. And we're working day and night to keep folks safe from COVID-19 and to keep small businesses supported during this critical time.
While we had some big wins this election season (thanks to you!), we didn't secure the supermajority we needed to be assured we'd have the votes to execute on our big plans for Washington state. With the freeze coming, our opponents will use this time to raise hundreds of thousands of dollars to defeat the progress Washingtonians are depending on.
$30,000 will go a long way to supporting that work while we can't raise any contributions -- that's why I'm asking, right now:
**[Will you donate $5 or more before Friday's freeze deadline? I won't ask again for three months, and we can't fall short -- every dollar makes a difference.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13897?t=11&akid=8225%2E868730%2EEOwc1D)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13897?t=12&akid=8225%2E868730%2EEOwc1D)
---

PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: Election Update Memo for Friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
I didn't want to share the latest update, but as one of our nation's top patriots, I knew that you needed to see this. As of this moment, there is a very real chance that Democrats in Georgia have the momentum to flip the state and HIJACK our Senate Majority. I just ran the numbers, and in order to put a stop to them before it's TOO LATE we need to reach our goal before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. Now, I know that's a tall order, but we can't afford to fail to reach this benchmark, which is why I've also activated 500% matching for the members of our grassroots team.
**FROM:** Mitch McConnell
**SUBJECT:** UPDATE: The Georgia Senate Runoffs

**I didn 't want to share the latest update, but as one of our nation's top patriots, I knew that you needed to see this.**

_As of this moment, there is a very real chance that Democrats in Georgia have the momentum to flip the state and HIJACK our Senate Majority._

I just ran the numbers, and in order to put a stop to them before it's TOO LATE [_**we need to raise $152,816 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ofc1uzKWQCojcmqwcqy1Bfv9A6a885KYaaMpGKnrtgHosa9u1aOKTl0QpIg6LGC0EmmSvJOBsnsVeqDGIDoengYJ-nBzdJIuAH_ZBA3AMyMaeXoZPyIesnK21Rl0pOo5jqqZW_dvyXp26311QpnQ1Y9gJkIvs9fd9e-XCSQ0fC3cX5nhMAVj-aPAOZeYAnvtBNSc9ITfAy1UrG99C8cf0VLQKOIJ3u_kyqrde0_o_BxNBbj-brCvfD1GDG9wNmf6iI81NwLceBuJ66030wgdSVJ8Rhvorxk8QHqBoUOdTXH4hUjwu0z3lWGdSFmyrqUmmthNr8qsW0O_2ZFUcZbS8JNyVWqeejaaaLlELulKTMDoo5y0G4TdD9_DzGblomdi2G2tScA5dhLwKlVqAHIJjcmD_A7ViYLkmkYW2aLIwo9rYZ-38l_YQ==&c=VOSKAJVD1u32RAwsZb181YnN5baTuj--PF6-wYlk55q7Kwc3Msu2OQ==&ch=37-LGP76kKMdxqXR35yDzrQ5PL31Vq-wnV8QSQEOovvFCkJ3_zN0yA==)

Now, I know that's a tall order, Friend, but we can't afford to fail to reach this benchmark, [**which is why I 've also activated 500% matching for the members of our grassroots team.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ofc1uzKWQCojcmqwcqy1Bfv9A6a885KYaaMpGKnrtgHosa9u1aOKTl0QpIg6LGC0EmmSvJOBsnsVeqDGIDoengYJ-nBzdJIuAH_ZBA3AMyMaeXoZPyIesnK21Rl0pOo5jqqZW_dvyXp26311QpnQ1Y9gJkIvs9fd9e-XCSQ0fC3cX5nhMAVj-aPAOZeYAnvtBNSc9ITfAy1UrG99C8cf0VLQKOIJ3u_kyqrde0_o_BxNBbj-brCvfD1GDG9wNmf6iI81NwLceBuJ66030wgdSVJ8Rhvorxk8QHqBoUOdTXH4hUjwu0z3lWGdSFmyrqUmmthNr8qsW0O_2ZFUcZbS8JNyVWqeejaaaLlELulKTMDoo5y0G4TdD9_DzGblomdi2G2tScA5dhLwKlVqAHIJjcmD_A7ViYLkmkYW2aLIwo9rYZ-38l_YQ==&c=VOSKAJVD1u32RAwsZb181YnN5baTuj--PF6-wYlk55q7Kwc3Msu2OQ==&ch=37-LGP76kKMdxqXR35yDzrQ5PL31Vq-wnV8QSQEOovvFCkJ3_zN0yA==)

You know exactly what will happen if we FAIL on January 5th. Chuck Schumer will RAISE your taxes, he'll PACK the Supreme Court with liberal Justices, and he'll FORCE dangerous regulations into our lives.

Simply put, this would be nothing short of a NIGHTMARE, and in order to make sure it NEVER becomes our reality [**I 'm counting on you to rush a 5X MATCHED GIFT before 11:59 PM tonight.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ofc1uzKWQCojcmqwcqy1Bfv9A6a885KYaaMpGKnrtgHosa9u1aOKTl0QpIg6LGC0EmmSvJOBsnsVeqDGIDoengYJ-nBzdJIuAH_ZBA3AMyMaeXoZPyIesnK21Rl0pOo5jqqZW_dvyXp26311QpnQ1Y9gJkIvs9fd9e-XCSQ0fC3cX5nhMAVj-aPAOZeYAnvtBNSc9ITfAy1UrG99C8cf0VLQKOIJ3u_kyqrde0_o_BxNBbj-brCvfD1GDG9wNmf6iI81NwLceBuJ66030wgdSVJ8Rhvorxk8QHqBoUOdTXH4hUjwu0z3lWGdSFmyrqUmmthNr8qsW0O_2ZFUcZbS8JNyVWqeejaaaLlELulKTMDoo5y0G4TdD9_DzGblomdi2G2tScA5dhLwKlVqAHIJjcmD_A7ViYLkmkYW2aLIwo9rYZ-38l_YQ==&c=VOSKAJVD1u32RAwsZb181YnN5baTuj--PF6-wYlk55q7Kwc3Msu2OQ==&ch=37-LGP76kKMdxqXR35yDzrQ5PL31Vq-wnV8QSQEOovvFCkJ3_zN0yA==)

body:
I will protect the lives of the unborn, work to strengthen the economy, remove bureaucratic red tape, and more. But Democrat leaders like Nancy Pelosi and her allies will do anything within their power to prevent me from achieving these goals.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hD0D_rSAXlfcHZquCZ2W0L7OrHBxz4J05ZR7VSQvVDx8AuzK47OxIPkRIQ6NHl1glQcQZRe4Co2vfW9kaAE5Iuu1HU5lH_v7zQk6oPvxjycMiOAPZIxZk9GNgJDfsrrdsPWoi078gq--a5Q2E5rh6CrkOGmw1LC-ZfCPRKrn_rHeS_9PC2AxKFotcJz8s8v62fbFGryI0FSoIc8aAUirYwIaPddD0qMGG-47av6SqhEoGVfsXfLSZ08v_ESRzKbtJCy5MF2oA63CkGZrUHdpm3bZnxIEGoyUIKSUj2A4KIh6bbbNQ3zXf_vFk08YtqN74-46TCTttKD5_9M2t23on95zUdCGLLPigK5nYZU3L1jvMOKwUQY5wbdkf8-FG_1gjKrM_mKtz2F1cQed6UhdYA==&c=Gfes_gzuXiLe0JIsWU0zIga-Z0iXAL10d9uZx26TCN2nqTZMs_GadQ==&ch=mfAbhPHRaEr7Do4peJKbnt093KWIUUfjrR57-Q032mu8St7LAkGqLA==)
Friend, every day I am thankful for your incredible impact in electing me to be the next representative of Oklahoma's 5th District. In Congress, I will keep the promises I made to you throughout my campaign. I will protect the lives of the unborn, work to strengthen the economy, remove bureaucratic red tape, and more. _But Democrat leaders like Nancy Pelosi and her allies will do anything within their power to prevent me from achieving these goals._ During her time as Speaker of the House, Pelosi has pushed her agenda even further by bowing to the left wing of her party. She actively supports their agenda and is focused on partisan gains rather than on delivering for the American people. _Time after time she continues to hold up relief for hurting American families just to play political games while many livelihoods hang in the balance. To be frank, she has failed the American people._ When I go to Congress in January, I will stand up to Pelosi and the 'Squad' to make sure that our shared values are represented and that the House of Representatives is truly working for the people. I hope you will stand with me. [**Friend, will you take just a moment to grade Nancy Pelosi 's performance as Speaker?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hD0D_rSAXlfcHZquCZ2W0L7OrHBxz4J05ZR7VSQvVDx8AuzK47OxIPkRIQ6NHl1ggZIy1fkjc2v28euuvp37ug5fcNiJHqIJPvkvtC1b6eDuVaq6uP2qcO69caeB1J-CB5hP_IdsD927F6ZEn4Q4GYeLOEMFa8D-nq9ewbQ9bVPow_BIA8NHgAb3T9aQooiTaK_NcR2yA4QR2XgMlGj7n3YVcMR2Zs-SQoFQZ6DvDudX5Xll8QAJJOh4_xTB94npfjBi9Z1axTvyS4YEYgLgvE0hSkFBOS-bOy7qVwbOxzQanLv2loQQnaRPQ1DUi6m3F63A3cE9cisvEfV_nGOnoyx8667qgNI3Ol3neKzVQAq4LgpFQ8W3ls9r9Rd461n5Olu9OUZUJL_Qr1rZNYgRXg==&c=Gfes_gzuXiLe0JIsWU0zIga-Z0iXAL10d9uZx26TCN2nqTZMs_GadQ==&ch=mfAbhPHRaEr7Do4peJKbnt093KWIUUfjrR57-Q032mu8St7LAkGqLA==) name: Josh Hawley
subject: Less than ONE MONTH!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
We are less than a month away from the Senate runoffs in Georgia. Peter,
We are less than a month away from the Senate runoffs in Georgia. My team and I are working harder than ever to ensure that Georgians get out and vote to defend Conservative values at the polls on January 5th. **These elections are crucial to the future of our country, as they will decide the fate of the Senate.**

We need strong conservative values represented by Republican Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler in the Senate. _If we lose these seats, we will lose the Senate majority, and all of Congress will be run by Democrats!_

_**Please join us and hold the line to protect our freedoms from socialism. The future of our nation hangs in the balance.**_
[_**Help us Keep the Senate RED! >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0e144d457dff4c538666da82c46d6467&_e=DJcmGofonfDc3YqCzvrOQLEbjCqh0SoR5UL5xIAv7ASeRsuUYN_fsMneHXh2vzKxP_ZHUV5UG1jQQJkMMACseD9BOBJA44ePit-7yerZ7Mfq9ELZdsQ4bxI2AgxtlM4uOknl6wdsE5gv69qJie8glCBqvKFu9vSDKGmgzZOcDMcRsIP1GRp5bU66qInawvKf38whG3Gi5nBw_9XYIxFytN6VW74B8D-Xm1ZMpXBFQCdSynp5-0e6rb9kU2rz5sjq0B2cXLooTDHxHd_bZPTaQTX0u-YKLlQ72DILZPLDSztCB19pI_cyfCTmjKjYgtfsJUfv4hvQBzWPycOE1-S-iqADahqvQr_l3q6byt67i6HjM2XO6X-fS8OCsDd9ENqy2A_kTv1fAP73qEk9qB1EYGlY8BL0tg1lrOzAg8u0i8s%3D)

Democrats’ plan to “change the world” translates to expanding the number of seats on the Supreme Court, **taxpayer-funded abortion on demand** , cozying up to the **China Communist Party** and big tech companies that violate our First Amendment right to **free speech** by continuing the unconstitutional censoring of conservative opinions, and a complete government takeover of our energy and heath care industries with the **$93 Trillion** Green New Deal and a **$32 Trillion** Medicare-for-all plan that would ban private health insurance.

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: BREAKING: WARNOCK-TIED VOTER GROUP, UNDER INVESTIGATION FOR FRAUD, TOOK MASSIVE PPP LOAN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, DECEMBER 8, 2020 BREAKING: WARNOCK-TIED VOTER GROUP, UNDER INVESTIGATION FOR FRAUD, TOOK MASSIVE PPP LOAN
ATLANTA - [New data reveals](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B5_EAqrIItYValRv6fa9HIEn41n0nAxjw9Sv39_g_cfipdzvf6qn9BVewUALmUahjkj0nSMGg34K3iUC1Ok9IoTfcwUFKvzCvoXCo9OS0GFEfg-lFMwh696wEIXUkXXhOtUTV2Plfanow71I1cvWaAwqDMI6VjIpB8Q==&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==) that the group formerly led by Raphael Warnock and currently led by Stacey Abrams [got a massive loan](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B5_EAqrIItYVavu3LTAkaVW_GEpQ_q6brYcw4W68XVATYsWlId7WPNz3z6dmI0TkWTsNA0JcNmI3Zr04tMRXtm0phECDuIzRaAR0Ie2ZEDREBH7f1eCg1f9d5Ze3bi-ncDT4Yb0nK5XdCf3t1w44r2GWJgEDhIsjApgxV0bzka6ZBOH7Vd5FAQH23TmdhbEk-R4IZ7wgCmVVt&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==) from the Paycheck Protection Program earlier this year -- despite Warnock, Abrams, and Jon Ossoff attacking the relief program for months.
Data shows that the New Georgia Project received a total of $482,000 from the PPP -- more than four times the program's [average loan size](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B5_EAqrIItYVaA-QerR3Qsq5hGYZQcwIF2NDiOyara4f9Zs1UoeZ93ENdnGgGHXDxwC8oLWldW62I-t3PTa1j8JfhB3msTnalSuMVbAct8X6BuJGnDuiJgSGpapfvBKce8x-Z7fzR2MfvjOiY8Q1BAYZlqzMlmW0LVtVA8GXEBm3BTwAvZ6aIwOqPwDOXEmtqiA==&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==). This follows last week's news that the group is [currently under investigation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B5_EAqrIItYVaqxC6L_VA0OyB_EWdre7EJNFOP-P26JrDpk1AF3g1JP-W_b98VLBq5Q75sFc7VJTr3tpbgEjlg8awU23BjBUu7aouCHHIMwCnUkuzYNGx8s6TtD_OqjdW88mFxn8ksaGvcMpBqh_DQ8Ut0XPv1xr4o3iYRwnwY65f&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==) by the Georgia Secretary of State for illegally registering out-of-state voters.
"For months, Raphael Warnock and Stacey Abrams have attacked and opposed the Paycheck Protection Program to score cheap political points -- yet they had no problem using it to fuel their illegal voter registration scheme," said Deputy Campaign Manager Stephen Lawson. "Warnock, Abrams, and the New Georgia Project must give Georgians a full accounting of exactly how this money was spent and why they received four times the average amount. Georgia families and businesses are struggling and, given that the New Georgia Project is already under investigation, anything less is completely unacceptable."

---
| BACKGROUND:
The New Georgia Project got a $482,000 loan from the Paycheck Protection Program. ("Warnock Voter-Registration Group Received $482,000 in PPP Loans," [Washington Free Beacon](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B5_EAqrIItYVavu3LTAkaVW_GEpQ_q6brYcw4W68XVATYsWlId7WPNz3z6dmI0TkWTsNA0JcNmI3Zr04tMRXtm0phECDuIzRaAR0Ie2ZEDREBH7f1eCg1f9d5Ze3bi-ncDT4Yb0nK5XdCf3t1w44r2GWJgEDhIsjApgxV0bzka6ZBOH7Vd5FAQH23TmdhbEk-R4IZ7wgCmVVt&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==), 12/08/2020)
The average PPP loan is $107,000. (PPP Results, [U.S. Small Business Administration](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B5_EAqrIItYVaA-QerR3Qsq5hGYZQcwIF2NDiOyara4f9Zs1UoeZ93ENdnGgGHXDxwC8oLWldW62I-t3PTa1j8JfhB3msTnalSuMVbAct8X6BuJGnDuiJgSGpapfvBKce8x-Z7fzR2MfvjOiY8Q1BAYZlqzMlmW0LVtVA8GXEBm3BTwAvZ6aIwOqPwDOXEmtqiA==&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==).)
Warnock has criticized PPP loan distribution, saying it should not be used by groups that are "politically well-connected." ("Jobs: Rebuilding An Economy That Works For Everyone," [Warnock for Georgia](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B5_EAqrIItYVa7aSznWscRtSxKhsOoRX1l2Q7ISAliiZck4VKiHtWXNTqDdBZWylb80TdGY99Sww3rRkRRmnv657OeTCGmryn7KDdXPq_38Uuw8ut9j8sTxs=&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==), accessed 12/08/2020.)
From 2014-2020, Warnock Served as Spokesman, CEO, and "Board Chair" of New Georgia Project, an Organization Founded by Stacey Abrams and Dedicated to Registering Minority Voters ("Massive voter registration drive in Georgia fights voter suppression," [Facing South Magazin](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B56wAEbR-g7_WsOBgJTKP8sG3rUxSQJeWisH4wGLfuTDklrRTKF8MgPxXxNbDCnuidb08Xhwg_ZqHELts5J9ZDJbCTiIDcEMwUiA1XcaMz0OIdecttUOLfXcT_Vmm3fZ8v4NDts5DGyUlFCkTpT8kHHtrH3tL6x70kV7CEc1QLV3EYGYV6-vD4RthsOnnu5tMBQ==&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==)[e](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B56wAEbR-g7_WsOBgJTKP8sG3rUxSQJeWisH4wGLfuTDklrRTKF8MgPxXxNbDCnuidb08Xhwg_ZqHELts5J9ZDJbCTiIDcEMwUiA1XcaMz0OIdecttUOLfXcT_Vmm3fZ8v4NDts5DGyUlFCkTpT8kHHtrH3tL6x70kV7CEc1QLV3EYGYV6-vD4RthsOnnu5tMBQ==&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==), 10/16/2014; "AJC Election Central; Voter probe ignites debate," Atlanta Journal-Constitution, 9/12/2014; New Georgia Project, Inc. Business Formation, Georgia Secretary of State Corporations Division, Filed 5/31/ 2017; New Georgia Project, Inc., 2017 Form 990, Filed 5/30/2019; "Board chair named at the New Georgia Project," [The New Georgia Project Press Release](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B56wAEbR-g7_WNa1NLF9iVDXJgT_YLL9z3WY4bR1XEYfqcDLMxsH9DQepGcWNyJubJLT1sYaWAo3tJ5s4DRNGxYvF_xrWhRfNX_85lNpK9AMBzbT8AMPwR9iM5lD_ht-wsUBX1O9tDUD8zlIDiC6YzKGCo29X8HZA_PkcBxs6LWIwMh4wkjA-5pWM-J5Zj54KPw==&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==), 6/8/2017)
The New Yorker Reported that Abrams Received a Salary of $177,000 as Part- Time CEO of New Georgia Project - Atlanta Journal-Constitution Reported that Abrams Had Pocketed $442,000 over Three Years from Her Nonprofits, Including New Georgia Project, and Used the Foundations to Build the Infrastructure for Her 2018 Gubernatorial Campaign In 2019, The New Yorker profiled Stacey Abrams and her fight for voting rights. The article noted that Abrams as a part-time CEO of the New Georgia Project received a salary of $177,000. In 2018, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution reported that Abrams received a total of $442,000 in compensation over three years from her non-profit foundations, including New Georgia Project, and had used the foundations to build the infrastructure for her gubernatorial campaign in 2018. ("The Vote Next Time," The New Yorker, 8/19/2019; Alan Judd, "Voter drive raised millions, but Abrams won't say from whom," [Atlanta Journal-Constitution](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B56wAEbR-g7_WGJ_-kccmInppvGl9dsYd1D4c_YYwFZGO-8PBA0pUD4ujNPOANvh30ZfzfqiZTVf_--OQ7TKWGArMxM9ZVjK6u6_N5IFS0gWr2iJCrEZryAD2Xt7o0awTFyiCozyA-iAOecNdT-wN27OMKbX_E44rIqFN9KW9sy51omXVIWPlIh93P7cZnvzQ9z0oZlXbynIwKg1ntVVQvt0vpBzMm7mi-wehu4RhLoHfx98Gmxu0YsPmJrdBIOhhnw==&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==), 9/15/2018)
George Soros and His Son, Alexander Soros, Helped Finance the New Georgia Project In October 2019, the Washington Post profiled Stacey Abrams' political career after she announced she would not run for U.S. Senate in Georgia. The article noted that billionaire Democratic mega-donor George Soros and his son Alexander Soros helped finance Abrams' New Georgia Project, stating "It drew funding from billionaire George Soros and his son Alexander, Abrams has said." ("Abrams plans her future amid pressure of expectations," Washington Post, 5/5/2019)
In September 2014, then-Georgia Secretary of State Brian Kemp Opened an Investigation into the New Georgia Project over Voter Registration Fraud Allegations - a Preliminary Inquiry Found "Significant Illegal Activities" The preliminary inquiry found "significant illegal activities" including: "forged voter registration applications, forged signatures on releases allowing for photocopying of applications, applications with inaccurate or false information, applications completed or "forged" after telephone conversations between voters and the project's representatives, voters being told they were legally required to re-register to vote, voters being told they needed to apply for a voter identification card because they could not use a driver's license when voting." ("AJC Election Central; Voter drive faces fraud allegations," Atlanta Journal-Constitution, 9/11/2014)
In September 2014, the State Election Board Agreed to Hear the Voter Registration Fraud Case - the State Probe Found 28 Forged Documents with 26 More Considered Suspicious. As part of the investigation, then-Secretary of State Brian Kemp issued a subpoena to the New Georgia Project. In September 2014, the Augusta Chronicle reported that the state probe into New Georgia Project voter registrations application found a total of 28 forged documents with 26 more considered suspicious. ("AJC Election Central; Voter registration case to be heard," Atlanta Journal-Constitution, 9/16/2014; Christina A. Cassidy, "28 forged documents uncovered in probe of Georgia voter registration group, investigator says," [Augusta Chronicle](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B56wAEbR-g7_Wz7Dib6NSctRojiz54oGeq5CFMbqHCAz3HeojqXPeJ5ga-G9eM_KmGDjno_OOvTF11NJX612kM-0jlLuhQsxDNT5RWxog_vzbOHxK_t8hHjbi6ncU5D5w4cfcPkaE7NQHFu399Ab9oaU=&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==), 9/17/2014)
In September 2017, the State Election Board Unanimously Recommended Criminal Charges against 17 Former New Georgia Project Canvassers Meeting minutes from the State Election Board's September 20, 2017 meeting show that the Board unanimously voted to recommend the criminal charges against 17 former New Georgia Project canvassers. (Alan Judd, "Voter drive raised millions, but Abrams won't say from whom," [Atlanta Journal-Constitution](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B56wAEbR-g7_WGJ_-kccmInppvGl9dsYd1D4c_YYwFZGO-8PBA0pUD4ujNPOANvh30ZfzfqiZTVf_--OQ7TKWGArMxM9ZVjK6u6_N5IFS0gWr2iJCrEZryAD2Xt7o0awTFyiCozyA-iAOecNdT-wN27OMKbX_E44rIqFN9KW9sy51omXVIWPlIh93P7cZnvzQ9z0oZlXbynIwKg1ntVVQvt0vpBzMm7mi-wehu4RhLoHfx98Gmxu0YsPmJrdBIOhhnw==&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==), 9/15/2018; [State Election Board](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YOeD8GO5TXsypaBv-wlHlUZT1fZIVvB7GoC2cP4Aqls_g7etaE5B56wAEbR-g7_Wz4kO7xQlOScxo9V1AaW76wncVvugV00CCNfaj8HIOsBlNjQ7-FTnAb08x-uWVE0bgmjFipEs5PvGYivD482Ej2a3SEmyGY7FWdjCj1VwqnCAhAHDJd2YpbhtlG2Bph48CmlqVFimWvAw4LTbeXDI7A==&c=9Y9llRUsAVNxLPohWEXuxFtj4rcQnZX3QQ1ZYXP8mk9VDesvx_lbXw==&ch=miItcRIBTnN3fmLdOwxEiGphSxhZvFOt1cOO_IK3LqrcMPQXaL3ozQ==), Item j.) SEB Case No. 2014-014 New Georgia Project - Voter Registration, Passed 5-0, 9/20/2017)

body:
Join us in the fight against socialism.
| Friend,
---
We cannot allow socialists like Ilhan Omar and AOC to dictate the course of the next Congress.
---
Which is why I formed the Freedom Force with a select group of diverse _Trump-supporting_ Republicans in the incoming Congress to fight back against the squad’s radical agenda on **DAY ONE**.
---
My good friend and fellow Congressman-elect, Burgess Owens, said it best...
---

clean_body: Join us in the fight against socialism. | Friend, We cannot allow socialists like Ilhan Omar and AOC to dictate the course of the next Congress. Which is why I formed the Freedom Force with a select group of diverse Trump-supporting Republicans in the incoming Congress to fight back against the squad’s radical agenda on DAY ONE. My good friend and fellow Congressman-elect, Burgess Owens, said it best... “We have a group of people who believe in our country, believe in God, family, respect for women and authority, and another group who hates everything I just mentioned.” Thank you, Byron Donalds Congressman-elect FL-19 \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Byron Donalds Sent: Thurs, Dec 3, 2020 Subject: Stop the Squad To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Like you, I am sick and tired of seeing Omar’s squad rip apart our country. That’s why I’ve formed the Freedom Force with a select group of diverse Trump-supporting Republicans in the incoming Congress to fight back against the squad and enact conservative policies. I recently went on Fox & Friends to bring national attention to the Freedom Force. But now we need your help funding our fight so that we can get to work on DAY ONE. Republicans have the most diverse group of incoming congressional members in history -- and our Freedom Force captures our diversity and energy. I am proud to fight alongside representatives from all over the nation who believe in our founding principles and know that America can never become a socialist country. But now we need you to fight by our side. Thank you, Rep. Byron Donalds Congressman-elect FL-19 Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108

subject: WATCH LIVE at 2 p.m. ET: President Trump addresses Operation Warp Speed Vaccine Summit
body:
Today, President Trump will speak at a vaccine summit as part of his Administration’s historic Operation Warp Speed. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ab03418f9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 8, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH LIVE at 2 p.m. ET: President Trump addresses Operation Warp Speed Vaccine Summit**
---
| [**WATCH: President Trump speaks LIVE at 2 p.m. ET**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9faf5f1c91&e=3ee4985eea) **Today, President Trump will speak** at a vaccine summit as part of his Administration’s historic Operation Warp Speed. The summit—with help from governors, retail pharmacy chains, and distributors—will highlight the strategy for getting a safe, effective vaccine to the American people quickly. **“The most important thing** for me personally is making sure people understand that these vaccines were developed safely, that they are over 90% effective,” Surgeon General Jerome Adams says. **Operation Warp Speed began** in May. It is an historic achievement that there are now potentially _two_ 95% effective vaccines only 10 months after COVID-19 reached American shores. Upon approval, around 40 million doses will be immediately releasable. [**MORE: A possible rollout of vaccine within days!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8d81cc14f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c380d038f4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8b6a9805c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=cd69f8d644)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Are you with us?

body:
Friend,

Chuck Schumer and his far-left allies will never stop trying to change the America we love.

**_We still have two critical battles in Georgia where 2 Senate seats remain undecided._**

body:
Things are getting DESPERATE for our efforts to secure a GOP victory and protect Trump's legacy!

[**Things are getting DESPERATE for our efforts to secure a GOP victory and protect Trump 's legacy!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001urhQd2f7suBNzSZqx4K3726RbOiZhPeao4XbW1vk5x4NX_5r7wAUdnowkn8yZIquErF_AjAANtFd5Dg0qgoz_3ASzYyc0rN6b08ywyNq-4zzEBrHd1QmtHiNl2v2xKyMXO-Y3wMFLbKLkz1L7KWI3RXKBF63BzDe6J0HclcJ68Wa9PILfQc55HofgDRFV0mcyJDdlBFDh4xecDYK1m0GZmuUB3GwdvJ00-gt0HoNUwmpqOUT5hOstrk9UvBLB9MOmg0w4go_ejeRMWZ7M6W-k4tsa3g_lDf3nNhA_GVXI0Q7AhQX16-GRFU5Of6_GqIjVV5AY-aiDYDmDJi8FbKYRn5stnaLCM9QOeOQ1jJOmYAUZdqxJ0TQj6ae4adX75MgArW5ZZbW6F-5suJ9qJQmW_G2bISNugd-TR_H9u_cO5CFFzF4KZ6K7dr2aTlntTpbpkWJW0uoGms=&c=-L_Z8C-R-4o_lMzOBM6bx_Y5FLy0DKcC-ECMtfq14xyTrc0s-ICUWA==&ch=F7qs3oiH86o0QNNtSY0emGSRmnwn8E9vxkYB1J40LvHXODmJfxpfSg==)

There are still uncalled races and resources have run dry.
