name: Holcomb Crew
subject: We’re making Hoosier roads safer - here’s how.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Did you hear the big news? Governor Holcomb and the Indiana Department of Transportation just awarded $101 million of Community Crossings grants to... | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Hey friend - we have big news!
_ _
Governor Holcomb and the Indiana Department of Transportation just awarded $101 million in Community Crossings grants to Indiana communities!
_ _
The Community Crossings Matching Grant Program assists local communities in the repair, ongoing maintenance, and improvement of their roads and bridges – making sure Hoosiers’ first and last miles of their days are durable and safe.
_
_**And with this funding round, every single high-priority road project submitted by an Indiana community is being funded by these grants — asphalt will be poured soon in 241 cities, towns, and counties across our state.**
[**Share the good news on Facebook**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b3c744dda7c5469bb57a12e1c5badbf0&_e=pF4gJVlGvM2CiK6rRnSLE9Li8sb_SqAwCOaB4KneXZzd75ZE5Gsyu1hmaYugUz0J4l537Cz-vPvmfjUadSr3KI97MUcgPl3NpcmvUNT0pLMOLnWowFby4eUB8mwyCRhjbWdkW6r4bFCOiwT37rDdtsja9wtu56hhTNPRaHybPbvaFohF24qa4hVrN0yVzQtg0GppOVDqQ6yrroQ5FYw39el6PInQUrFctARIKmmJOJ03hUy-wEHxzxEXqdQ9lda8x8mF1zWrtvOmCRX5mzZgrqzR9scCMj-uwpIqiXSiIcqMA-BXZ-2PT4ezo7mRD30zKEtu6HqnpdX0Xp2l9VUrEORJt19UdkZbOni7UBQ8_NFqOO1P0gjIRPfELhdMdsHh22jmQG-Qxd6MhZDJeUPzu8KIzpbnypV_GAcYTLCRAlFEgwTAUqKnA_P2_5015QebboLlyAY6Owwo6oLEQLgu6OtCtApNKXKbpYVbag-bR0zNBm7m8hYtdijITqwviAv5)
Indiana is called the Crossroads of America for a reason, and we’re dedicated to making sure Hoosiers are safe when we drive to work, pick up our kids from school, and travel to see family.
_“As we navigate through the challenges created by the COVID-19 pandemic, we’re as committed as ever to improving and building out our state’s infrastructure. I’m incredibly pleased that we’re able to fund all of the high-priority local road projects submitted in this call for projects. Taking care of our local roads is essential to making sure our communities remain attractive places to grow businesses and create careers” - Governor Eric Holcomb_
[**Share the good news on Facebook**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b3c744dda7c5469bb57a12e1c5badbf0&_e=pF4gJVlGvM2CiK6rRnSLE9Li8sb_SqAwCOaB4KneXZzd75ZE5Gsyu1hmaYugUz0J4l537Cz-vPvmfjUadSr3KI97MUcgPl3NpcmvUNT0pLMOLnWowFby4eUB8mwyCRhjbWdkW6r4bFCOiwT37rDdtsja9wtu56hhTNPRaHybPbvaFohF24qa4hVrN0yVzQtg0GppOVDqQ6yrroQ5FYw39el6PInQUrFctARIKmmJOJ03hUy-wEHxzxEXqdQ9lda8x8mF1zWrtvOmCRX5mzZgrqzR9scCMj-uwpIqiXSiIcrzH0pCw9BkUOUNj5mg-c1HX5yHv4bdK-HpPFQ1qmwNBr25enfjp6g5TXuyuzEDcA7ihRe0Q3V88Bt33XGDXR11llaefQUJCrKY6h0iRUxwHPwEkZdPbv1MlbhUqBkurD__TQh_S54Ih9EHYBp3Et4m5YgCIBme7RHImkyG_7UVi45s6XXB1sL7aMnG_yqNF8XCWHfjLYqC5bb12Nfazm5N)
The Community Crossings Initiative has provided funding totaling more than $738 million in state matching funds for construction projects since the beginning of the program. It’s just one of the ways we’re working to build One Indiana for All, and deliver results for Hoosiers across our state.
_“This is a tremendous win for our local partners. Our continued partnership with Hoosier communities will deliver more high priority local road projects in the coming year, many of which have been in planning for months or even years and wouldn’t be able to move forward now without the state’s funding commitment.” - Indiana Department of Transportation Commissioner Joe McGuinness._
[**Share the good news on Facebook**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b3c744dda7c5469bb57a12e1c5badbf0&_e=pF4gJVlGvM2CiK6rRnSLE9Li8sb_SqAwCOaB4KneXZzd75ZE5Gsyu1hmaYugUz0J4l537Cz-vPvmfjUadSr3KI97MUcgPl3NpcmvUNT0pLMOLnWowFby4eUB8mwyCRhjbWdkW6r4bFCOiwT37rDdtsja9wtu56hhTNPRaHybPbvaFohF24qa4hVrN0yVzQtg0GppOVDqQ6yrroQ5FYw39el6PInQUrFctARIKmmJOJ03hUy-wEHxzxEXqdQ9lda8x8mF1zWrtvOmCRX5mzZgrqzR9scCMj-uwpIqiXSiIcqW3vtPts-ceA9J8a5n1q5IDVgOUq65-S4kZPa06jkwkrbLrEGT4XqXCSydi51g-h8Jh_PbCO67OqtUCVI-D8xjN-Tr8KDGsrSkrfS7zdhE2uZqIlkYoQssueXqg_6LVmOCD0g4IY-jM1H6hW5x_6CRmLOB5cDraJZ2MlvaAgfqumcpkKbtDmlg9oeIdfaUTnASrb6ynBbuXl9ujG7VR40f)
**[Check here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b3c744dda7c5469bb57a12e1c5badbf0&_e=pF4gJVlGvM2CiK6rRnSLEwxspt3QvOE1o8vJftyPQXDo1rqWEibu9mtXAOgl0bbuGZq7_kvnldHbq1OoDnrZSpAs6jURqJvy8TOHZ42JqiyFHgE6hkOzUgmw1s7Msi2T1dbrBTBXPWf_CM9V3iH9V5u5ZWEC83vUwL6PN4oL-bLloZyksoIXCTKKWZr2zRlqOSAi_UOtqZPDZmrHbKa3kA-N2sbhojZQVcPBBI78bT2abiMcY7lFArO9CCf1FWO2lhAe-37xS2mZrAcaOrFVnK2jgy_FAXVjBitxVviH3E61uA7cdwA-q2-QVP1Kn2oANd1UaRoa727VM1OdsSbrnm3vrAvnjbkGN2-ogMvkblP_PfEdCUDCDV9wfu8eE1Lpf4oteOj0XDclW06dVtk_yeJq4A0_c7Pphhfp4y295SaN5KnCJe-aeD0NZx4C3LEdgC2jQawGrUB4Hw8ZYgiBLg%3D%3D)** to see if your community received grants through this funding round.

Will you help us spread the good news about Indiana’s latest round of Community Crossing grants?
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b3c744dda7c5469bb57a12e1c5badbf0&_e=pF4gJVlGvM2CiK6rRnSLE9Li8sb_SqAwCOaB4KneXZzd75ZE5Gsyu1hmaYugUz0J4l537Cz-vPvmfjUadSr3KI97MUcgPl3NpcmvUNT0pLMOLnWowFby4eUB8mwyCRhjbWdkW6r4bFCOiwT37rDdtsja9wtu56hhTNPRaHybPbvaFohF24qa4hVrN0yVzQtg0GppOVDqQ6yrroQ5FYw39el6PInQUrFctARIKmmJOJ03hUy-wEHxzxEXqdQ9lda8x8mF1zWrtvOmCRX5mzZgrqzR9scCMj-uwpIqiXSiIcrTJnQFwMnG5PhZNcleFxIfx9lsyguBJBJRQ2xZPDB3m8HceHD8eLZTosZ7sQsh6B0g5bSpg1-j8hxHd4POImdrYACMwv_TEUgqok4xJqFiHf2uIKdNQhibHhLHD_YYfFz1ie4iy_0fux35n7NJVkn03HEsfHy3bofBK6z8rLViJvPqjXWpUeMRXue3sYHzJWuZaLN35OiuW2hcIvui-xlq)
Thank you for your support,

Holcomb Crew

body:
Are you following us yet?
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=5024%2E53494%2EAv1zYK) Friend, You open Evergreen emails, and for that, we're grateful. It's an honor to know that so many people are keeping up with (and contributing to!) our work in the climate movement. If you have a moment right now, I hope you'll follow Evergreen Action on social media, too. As my friend (and Evergreen co-founder) Jamal Raad says, we are "Very OnlineTM." When you follow us, you can:
* Be among the first to hear about new memos
* Stay on top of news in the climate policy world
* Interact with others in the Evergreen community
* And, of course, help move climate action to the top of America's agenda!

And as a bonus, we sometimes even dunk on Big Oil companies when they send greenwashed, disingenuous tweets. **If you're not following us yet, take a minute to do so today:** | [FOLLOW ON FACEBOOK ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1293?t=3&akid=5024%2E53494%2EAv1zYK)

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: Joint Statement By Senators Kelly Loeffler And David Perdue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, DECEMBER 8, 2020 Joint Statement By Senators Kelly Loeffler And David Perdue
ATLANTA - U.S. Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue this evening released the following joint statement:
"We fully support President Trump's legal recourses and Attorney General Paxton's lawsuit. The President has every right to use every legal recourse available to guarantee these simple principles: every lawful vote cast should be counted, any illegal vote submitted cannot be counted, and there must be full transparency and uniformity in the counting process. This isn't hard and it isn't partisan. It's American. No one should ever have to question the integrity of our elections system and the credibility of its outcomes."

---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com)

|

body:
I will protect the lives of the unborn, work to strengthen the economy, remove bureaucratic red tape, and more. But Democrat leaders like Nancy Pelosi and her allies will do anything within their power to prevent me from achieving these goals.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jD-Mo7Ja5M8RiR1-QSjegD9gXhOCfa4CoC2eVGB9ana-ha46hYr_4a5CKNbOL0Ver5tX-w7MoxtafiqwOrd9vm8jMuAtf5P8mfn0hxSiFfJA4m5xu7Ts0scqwE_ueZ6nTX6AHBTs2t9sB9vETqf8f2d3taLxnCwjPwKwz1thcZNNWoLWM3E_QZ1Iz2tNWJO792FmSkvg4wRK34QvVQzRKoXzznoz-VWPY7_p6j0PWG2kxKmFlngDavdELxP5Syy1WLbhlxtcq5yIYQSV9LABf-2xFMqKaPiCgUCd-9AqEJIduS3Mrx-nQKzsbmqfKq36u9hdBeeXxIr4PenCNsTnfKi7305rmf1yeSUk0WBCW_IIH2u50u9QrD9-DHuwbOpF9ZPwQ39DxLBS8vBDWBUeGw==&c=gPB2UsnvMSAcATxmr_8gQp-LM8tWqMGR0Df0OsGnlbcNYRFNe_Y1ow==&ch=kPdEg5ox6d_PYRwTYLfH9m3ntByA-9P4RACfqu-I5H3LVrQp9RKnsA==)
Friend, every day I am thankful for your incredible impact in electing me to be the next representative of Oklahoma's 5th District. In Congress, I will keep the promises I made to you throughout my campaign. I will protect the lives of the unborn, work to strengthen the economy, remove bureaucratic red tape, and more. _But Democrat leaders like Nancy Pelosi and her allies will do anything within their power to prevent me from achieving these goals._ During her time as Speaker of the House, Pelosi has pushed her agenda even further by bowing to the left wing of her party. She actively supports their agenda and is focused on partisan gains rather than on delivering for the American people. _Time after time she continues to hold up relief for hurting American families just to play political games while many livelihoods hang in the balance. To be frank, she has failed the American people._ When I go to Congress in January, I will stand up to Pelosi and the 'Squad' to make sure that our shared values are represented and that the House of Representatives is truly working for the people. I hope you will stand with me. clean_body: I will protect the lives of the unborn, work to strengthen the economy, remove bureaucratic red tape, and more. But Democrat leaders like Nancy Pelosi and her allies will do anything within their power to prevent me from achieving these goals. == Friend, every day I am thankful for your incredible impact in electing me to be the next representative of Oklahoma's 5th District. In Congress, I will keep the promises I made to you throughout my campaign. I will protect the lives of the unborn, work to strengthen the economy, remove bureaucratic red tape, and more. But Democrat leaders like Nancy Pelosi and her allies will do anything within their power to prevent me from achieving these goals. During her time as Speaker of the House, Pelosi has pushed her agenda even further by bowing to the left wing of her party. She actively supports their agenda and is focused on partisan gains rather than on delivering for the American people. Time after time she continues to hold up relief for hurting American families just to play political games while many livelihoods hang in the balance. To be frank, she has failed the American people. When I go to Congress in January, I will stand up to Pelosi and the 'Squad' to make sure that our shared values are represented and that the House of Representatives is truly working for the people. I hope you will stand with me. == Your thoughts and opinions will tremendously help me as I head to Congress next month. == == == == == == In Congress, I will ensure that your voice is represented Democratic ideals do not become our reality. Thank you in advance for your thoughts, I so appreciate the opinions of top supporters like you. -- Stephanie Sent from my iPhone | Paid for by Bice for Congress PO BOX 21315 Oklahoma City, OK 73156 | | Bice for Congress | PO BOX 21315, Oklahoma City, OK 73156 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by
